name: Aragvadha
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies all three doshas.
mainMedicinalUses: Safest laxative for children and pregnant women.
Treats skin conditions and purifies blood.
plantProfile: Known as the 'Golden Shower' tree for its beautiful yellow flowers.
preparationMethods: Fruit pulp soaked in water and strained.
